# DealGapIQ

> DealGapIQ is a residential real estate deal analysis platform that scores investment properties across six acquisition strategies (Long-Term Rental, Short-Term Rental, BRRRR, Fix & Flip, House Hack, Wholesale) and surfaces the Deal Gap — the distance between the asking price and the price an investor should actually offer.

Founded by Brad Geisen — founder of Foreclosure.com (1999) — DealGapIQ blends data from Zillow, RentCast, Redfin, Realtor.com, and Mashvisor with its own IQ Estimate model. The platform is built for active residential investors who want a fast, transparent verdict on any property.

## Core entry points

- [Homepage](https://dealgapiq.com/): product overview and instant property scanner
- [About](https://dealgapiq.com/about): founder story, methodology philosophy, and the three proprietary metrics (Target Buy, Income Value, Deal Gap)
- [Pricing](https://dealgapiq.com/pricing): Starter (free) and Pro ($29.17/mo billed annually, or $39.99/mo, with 7-day free trial)
- [What is DealGapIQ](https://dealgapiq.com/what-is-dealgapiq): plain-English overview of the platform

## Product

- [IQ Verdict](https://dealgapiq.com/verdict): instant deal score (0–95) for any address with ranked strategy recommendations
- [Strategy](https://dealgapiq.com/strategy): full financial deep-dive — cash flow, NOI, DSCR, sensitivity analysis, 10-year projections
- [DealMaker](https://dealgapiq.com/deal-maker): editable assumptions, four pre-built offer structures, and AI-generated negotiation scripts

## Strategy guides

- [Long-Term Rental](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/long-term-rental)
- [Short-Term Rental](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/short-term-rental)
- [BRRRR](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/brrrr)
- [Fix & Flip](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/fix-flip)
- [House Hack](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/house-hack)
- [Wholesale](https://dealgapiq.com/strategies/wholesale)

## Glossary

- [Glossary index](https://dealgapiq.com/glossary): plain-English definitions of creative-finance structures used by active investors
- [Subject-To Financing](https://dealgapiq.com/glossary/subject-to-financing): definition, worked numerical example, and risks

## Reference

- [Help Center](https://dealgapiq.com/help): FAQ on getting started, scoring, reports, and account
- [Blog](https://dealgapiq.com/blog): articles on creative finance, offer scripts, and deal teardowns
